race.comment: LUCKY FORTUNA (5) is a seasoned sprinter who was a 1200m winner two back then dropped back to 1000m here last time and was out sped and finished fourth. This is much more suitable and has a great record this course and distance. Can immediately bounce back. ROSSANADO (2) returns from a break but has a good record fresh and a strong record course and distance. This suits and will be stalking throughout. FIELD OF PRAISE (12) came home hard and ran right away with an effortless win last time. This is tougher but fitter again and sure to run well. OCEAN'S JEN (10) was an easy winner this course and distance on Saturday. On the quick turn-around and could go back-to-back if lining up again. SELF SERVE (4) is flying lately with wins in the last two and will give a sight.
